source_intent.raw_intent: Case 079: I am a enterprise_compliance_lead in Latin America. Build a research_agent_prompt for finance_ops using the memory_lens. Chaos input type is overbroad_one_pass_lock. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build a governed research agent prompt for finance operations in Latin America, using the memory lens to surface compliance-relevant patterns, policy gaps, and claim-limit exposures from fragmented enterprise data. Scope: - The agent must ingest overbroad one-pass lock inputs (messy, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured research output with explicit validation gates. Focus on source policy and claim limits across LATAM finance ops. Constraints: - Must operate within Codex runtime environment. - Must use memory_lens to cross-reference historical compliance events and policy versions. - Must not hallucinate missing context; flag unknowns explicitly. - Must enforce validation gates at each research stage (source ingestion, pattern extraction, claim-limit mapping, output generation). - Must comply with enterprise compliance lead governance requirements for Latin America. Success Criteria: - Agent produces a research artifact with at least three validated compliance patterns from the overbroad input. - Claim-limit exposures are identified and mapped to specific policy sources. - All validation gates are documented in the output with pass/fail status. - Ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with recommended clarification steps. - Output is SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Output Contract: - format: JSON - sections: research_summary; compliance_patterns; claim_limit_analysis; validation_gates_log; ambiguity_flags; recommended_actions - validation_required: True - compilable_to_sr8: True
